generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque (τ_M) from input current (I_M) as part of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance GearWheelTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gearwheel component transforming rotational energy with low gear ratio in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming rotational energy (torque τ_G and τ_out) with low gear ratio in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance Sinumerik840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller acting as control system for the MABI MAX 100 robot, enabling dynamic adjustments to position, speed, and acceleration inputs/outputs."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder directly mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor measuring angular position (r_M)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring angular position (r_G) for backlash and elasticity analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) as input to the motor simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLMotorBlockDefinition : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the structural composition of the permanent magnet synchronous motor component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLGearWheelBlockDefinition : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the structural composition of the gearwheel component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLCycloidalGearboxBlockDefinition : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the structural composition of the cycloidal gearbox component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance IdealGearboxBaseModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing ideal behavior of the gearbox without friction effects (Fig. 4a)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for gearbox simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink friction model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics for gearbox simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink friction model implementing Dahl friction characteristics for gearbox simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink friction model implementing LuGre friction characteristics for gearbox simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing the ideal behavior of the permanent magnet synchronous motor (Fig. 4c)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearWheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing the ideal behavior of the gearwheel component (GW)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing the ideal behavior of the cycloidal gearbox component (GB)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing measured motor current (I_M) from the physical system."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing measured motor angular position (r_M) from primary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearWheelPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing measured gearwheel angular position (r_G) from secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing simulated motor torque (τ_M) derived from friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionModelOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearWheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing simulated gearwheel torque (τ_G) derived from friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionModelOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing simulated output torque (τ_out) derived from friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionModelOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing outputs from friction models (δr_M, δr_G, δr_out)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionModelProcessingData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelProcessingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Intermediate data representing processed friction effects from all friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IdealGearboxModelOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance IdealGearboxModelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing outputs from the ideal gearbox base model (without friction)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IdealGearboxBaseModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelProcessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool enabling creation of Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams for structural modeling of the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink tool enabling execution of friction models and component-specific simulations."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentSimulationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time transmission of sensor data (current, encoder readings) from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. controller."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing engine enabling calculation of torque (τ), angular velocity (ω), and acceleration from measured inputs."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCalculationService
]

instance FrictionModelProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing engine enabling subtraction of friction models from base model to simulate friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelProcessingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard enabling visualization of data traces and simulated outputs with traceable metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing structural modeling of the first axis components using SysML Block Definition and Internal Block Diagrams."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for gearbox simulation."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementAction
]

instance ComponentSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing executable simulations for motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox components."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComponentBehaviorInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time transmission of sensor data (current, encoder readings) via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDataInsight
]

instance DataCalculationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing calculation of torque (τ), angular velocity (ω), and acceleration from measured inputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides DerivedDataInsight
]

instance FrictionModelProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing processing of friction models to simulate friction effects on gearbox behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionEffectInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing unified visualization of data traces and simulated outputs with traceable metadata."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing structural composition of the first axis (Motor, Gearwheel, Cycloidal Gearbox) and their interconnections."
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing continuous identification of friction coefficients (Coulomb, viscous) for control algorithm refinement."
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action enabling dynamic updating of simulation models based on wear patterns or environmental effects."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComponentBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing ideal behavior of motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox components."
]

instance OperationalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing real-time operational data (current, encoder readings) for friction modeling."
]

    base:desc "Insight providing derived quantities (torque τ, angular velocity ω, acceleration) from measured inputs."
]

instance FrictionEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing analysis of friction effects on gearbox behavior through simulated outputs."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing unified visualization of data traces and simulated outputs with traceable metadata."
]

instance OperationalDiagnosticsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action detecting deviations between simulated and measured data to flag potential issues (e.g., gearbox wear, encoder drift)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action suggesting adjustments to motor current (I_M) or gear ratios to mitigate friction-related inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [

]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow operates on a **real-time, continuous time-scale** with synchronization to the physical system's operational frequency. Key time-related specifics include:
  - **Data Acquisition Rate**: Time-series data (e.g., encoder readings, current) streamed via MQTT at a rate sufficient for friction analysis (not explicitly quantified but implied to be high-frequency for dynamic control).
  - **Model Update Rate**: Friction models are updated dynamically during operation to reflect changes in wear or environmental conditions (e.g., temperature).
  - **Visualization Latency**: Dashboard updates in near real-time to reflect current operational states and model deviations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Centralized DS**: A single Digital Shadow for the first axis, integrating:
    - **Physical Data Sources**: Sensors (encoders, current sensor) and the Siemens controller.
    - **Virtual Components**: Simulation models (Motor, Gearwheel, Gearbox), friction models, and data calculation models.
    - **Processing Logic**: Executed in Simulink to compute deviations between measured and simulated data.
  - **Data Flow**:
    1. Physical data (e.g., I_M, encoder readings) → MQTT → DS.
    2. DS processes data via simulation/friction models → generates simulated outputs (ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out).
    3. Results visualized in a dashboard for analysis.
  - **No Decentralization**: The DS is a unified representation with traceable data flows between models and measurements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow covers the **operational phase** of the robot's life cycle, specifically:
  - **As Operated**: The DS represents the robot in its current state, including wear, tooling, and environmental conditions (e.g., temperature).
  - **Not as Designed or Manufactured**: The DS does not model the ideal or manufactured state but focuses on **real-time deviations** (e.g., friction losses) during operation.
  - **Purpose-Driven**: The DS is designed to improve **motion accuracy** by analyzing friction-related inaccuracies (up to 30% of positional errors) in real-time."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Verification**: Simulation models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) are validated against manufacturer-provided dynamics models and real-time sensor data.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Deviations between measured (r_M, r_G, r_out) and simulated (ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out) data are analyzed to identify friction losses and model inaccuracies.
  - **Traceability**: Each data trace is linked to its source (sensor or calculation) and processing component (e.g., Simulation M, Simulation GW), ensuring reproducibility.
  - **Validation Metrics**: The DS compares simulated outputs with real-time measurements to quantify friction-related inaccuracies (up to 30% of positional errors)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical system (PT) and Digital Shadow (DS) includes:
  - **Data Protocols**: MQTT for real-time streaming of sensor data (e.g., current I_M, encoder readings) from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. controller to the DS.
  - **Network Architecture**: Implied to be a **local industrial network** (not specified further) connecting the robot controller to the DS processing environment (e.g., Simulink).
  - **Data Format**: Time-series arrays of floating-point values (torque τ, angular velocity ω) with metadata for traceability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow is hosted and deployed in a **simulation environment** using:
  - **Primary Tool**: MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for executing simulation and friction models.
  - **Secondary Tools**: SysML diagrams (e.g., Block Definition Diagrams) for structural modeling, and a **unified dashboard** for visualization.
  - **Deployment Context**: The DS runs on a **local server or workstation** connected to the Siemens controller via MQTT, enabling real-time processing and visualization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows the following standards:
  - **SysML**: For structural and behavioral modeling of the robot's first axis (Block Definition Diagrams, Internal Block Diagrams).
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Implied for metadata management and contextual information (e.g., system properties).
  - **MQTT**: Standard protocol for real-time data streaming from the Siemens controller to the DS.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model**: UML-based conceptual framework (Fig. 1) for defining DS components (e.g., Purpose, DataTrace, Processing)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The document does not explicitly address security or safety considerations. However, the following can be inferred:
  - **Safety Cell**: The robot operates within a restricted range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed (75°/s) to prevent accidents.
  - **No Remote Operation**: The DS is a **passive entity** (one-way data flow) and does not execute operations remotely on the physical system.
  - **Data Privacy**: Not addressed; no mention of access controls or encryption for data streams (e.g., MQTT)."
]
